summary: Dashboard redesign testing completed successfully. All 14 UI elements verified working. Fixed missing /api/live-prices endpoint. Demo mode, signals, performance metrics, upgrade popup all functional.

fixed.fix: Added alias endpoint to route to /api/market/live-prices
